# @reformer/ui-kit — LLM Integration Guide (v7)

> Curated v7 summary. Generation of the full guide (docs/llms/*.md + JSDoc via
> `npm run generate:llms`) is still on the v6 sources — this file is the interim v7 API sheet.

Package: @reformer/ui-kit
Design system: shadcn/ui (style `new-york`, base color `neutral`, Tailwind CSS v4, oklch tokens)
Count: 72 components (60 in the root barrel + 12 subpath-only heavy components).
Model: pure shadcn primitives + `withFormControl` HOC producing form-bound `*Field` versions.

## 1. Install

```bash
npm install @reformer/ui-kit @reformer/core
```

Peer deps: `@reformer/core`, `@reformer/cdk`, `@reformer/renderer-react`, `react`, `react-dom`.
Requires Tailwind CSS v4 configured in the consumer app (see §6 Theme).

## 2. Import patterns

```ts
// Root barrel — 60 light components
import { Input, Select, Checkbox, Button, Box, FormField } from '@reformer/ui-kit';

// Per-component subpath (tree-shaking)
import { Input, InputField } from '@reformer/ui-kit/input';

// Heavy components — subpath ONLY (never in root barrel)
import { ChartContainer, type ChartConfig } from '@reformer/ui-kit/chart';
import { DataGrid, type TableSettings } from '@reformer/ui-kit/table';

// Props schemas (React-free) for MCP / renderer-json
import { defaultPropSchemas, mergeFieldPropsSchema } from '@reformer/ui-kit/meta';

// Theme (bare @import in a Tailwind entry, not a JS import)
// @import '@reformer/ui-kit/styles';
```

Exports map: `.` (barrel), `./meta`, `./styles`, and `./<component>` for each of the 72 components.

## 3. Component inventory

Root barrel (60): accordion, alert, alert-dialog, aspect-ratio, async-boundary, attachment, avatar,
badge, box, breadcrumb, bubble, button, button-group, card, checkbox, collapsible, context-menu,
dialog, direction, dropdown-menu, empty, example-card, field, form-array, form-field, form-wizard,
hover-card, input, input-group, input-mask, input-password, item, kbd, label, marker, menubar,
message, message-scroller, native-select, navigation-menu, pagination, popover, progress, radio-group,
scroll-area, section, select, separator, sheet, skeleton, slider, spinner, state, switch, tabs,
textarea, toggle, toggle-group, tooltip, typography.

Subpath-only (12, heavy optional-peer deps): calendar (react-day-picker), carousel (embla-carousel-react),
chart (recharts), combobox (cmdk), command (cmdk), date-picker (react-day-picker), drawer (vaul),
input-otp (input-otp), resizable (react-resizable-panels), sidebar, sonner (sonner),
table (@tanstack/react-table). Import each via `@reformer/ui-kit/<name>`.

ReFormer-specific (not shadcn): Box, Section, FormField, FormArraySection, FormWizard, AsyncBoundary,
ErrorState/LoadingState (`@reformer/ui-kit/state`), InputMask, InputPassword, ExampleCard.

## 4. Variants concept

Each component is a catalog `src/components/<cmp>/variants/`:
- `base` — always present; the verbatim shadcn primitive (`data-slot`, unified `radix-ui`, `cn`).
- functional variants (`async`, `number`, `data-grid`, …) — added per real use-case, NOT per style
  (size/color/label-placement are ordinary props/classes inside the implementation).

Barrel exports per component: primitives + sub-parts + every `*Field` + alias `<Cmp>Field` + props schemas.

## 5. Form integration — `*Field` + `withFormControl`

Primitives are pure shadcn and use their native events (`Input`→`onChange(e)`, `Checkbox`→
`onCheckedChange`, `Slider`→`onValueChange`). The form seam needs value-based `value` + `onChange(value)`,
so each form-control ships a field version built by the internal HOC:

```ts
// internal (src/fields) — mechanism, not a public import:
withFormControl(Primitive, adapter) // adapters: nativeInput, checked, valueChange, slider, date, pressed
```

Naming: `<Cmp><Variant>Field` + alias `<Cmp>Field` (default form variant). In an M1 schema, a field's
`component` points at the `*Field` version (NOT the bare primitive). `value`/`onChange`/`onBlur`/
`disabled` are resolved by `<FormField>` — never put them in `componentProps`.

| Component | Field export(s) | Alias |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Input | InputBaseField, InputNumberField | InputField (dispatch by `type`) |
| InputPassword | InputPasswordBaseField | InputPasswordField |
| InputMask | InputMaskBaseField | InputMaskField |
| InputOTP | InputOTPBaseField | InputOTPField |
| Textarea | TextareaBaseField | TextareaField |
| Select | SelectAsyncField | SelectField |
| NativeSelect | NativeSelectBaseField | NativeSelectField |
| Checkbox | CheckboxBaseField | CheckboxField |
| Switch | SwitchBaseField | SwitchField |
| Toggle | ToggleBaseField | ToggleField |
| ToggleGroup | ToggleGroupBaseField | ToggleGroupField |
| RadioGroup | RadioGroupBaseField | RadioGroupField |
| Slider | SliderBaseField | SliderField |
| Calendar | CalendarBaseField | CalendarField |
| DatePicker | DatePickerBaseField | DatePickerField |
| Combobox | ComboboxBaseField | ComboboxField |

Minimal usage:

```tsx
const schema = {
  loanType: {
    value: model.$.loanType,
    component: SelectField, // field version
    componentProps: { label: 'Тип', options: [{ value: 'x', label: 'X' }] },
    validators: [required()],
  },
};
// <FormField control={form.loanType} testId="loanType" />
```

renderer-json: register field versions under the JSON name — `reg.component('Input', InputField)`,
`reg.component('Select', SelectField)`, `reg.component(FIELD_WRAPPER, FormField)`.

## 6. Theme (`@reformer/ui-kit/styles`)

Ships shadcn oklch tokens (new-york / neutral), the dark variant, and `tw-animate-css`. Import it
BARE inside the consumer's Tailwind v4 entry:

```css
@import 'tailwindcss';
@import '@reformer/ui-kit/styles';
@source '../node_modules/@reformer/ui-kit/dist';
```

Notes: the bare `@import` is required (`layer(theme)` breaks `@custom-variant`). The Tailwind entry
(`@import 'tailwindcss'`) and `@source` stay with the consumer — the theme provides tokens/animations,
not Tailwind itself. Do not declare your own `@custom-variant dark` (last one silently wins).

## 7. Gotchas

- `component` in a schema = the `*Field` version; the bare primitive won't round-trip value under FormField.
- `disabled` in `componentProps` is dead (FormField sets it from node state) — use `control.disable()`.
- `required` in `componentProps` IS live (wrapper draws the `*` marker).
- Heavy components are absent from the barrel by design — import via subpath.
- `@reformer/ui-kit/meta` is React-free (props schemas for MCP/DSL validation), safe to load in plain Node.
